ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Continued To May-03-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Curtis Parkin in Propria Persona.

Mr. Parkin stated that Mr. Muck was in Bakersfield, that he ran into some heavy fog and that it was unclear as to where he is. He also stated that there haven't been any further audits from the Internal Revenue Service or the Franchise Tax Board, that the CPA felt there was a possibility of an audit because the Decedent's taxes were very agressive and that the CPA suggested waiting until the statute of limtations expires in August/September of 2011. In addition, Mr. Parkin stated that there was $26,600.00 and a vehicle left in the Estate and there was a property that had been sold. The Court stated that an Inventory and Appraisal needed to be filed. The matter was continued to May 3, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the Inventory and Appraisal and a further status report of closing of the estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Bloom.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Continued To Jan-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Hesketh specially appearing for Curtis Muck on behalf the Administrator.

Mr. Hesketh requested a continuance stating that there were anticipated audits from the Internal Revenue Service and Franchise Tax Board, and that he did not know if information had been provided to the Probate Referee. The matter was continued to January 25, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the Inventory and Appraisal and status of filing of the Petition for Final Distribution.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Continued To Dec-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Continued To Nov-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Continued To Jul-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Curtis Muck for and with Curtis Willard Parkin.

The Court stated that the Estate has been pending way too long and that an appearance could have been avoided if the status report had been filed a week ago. Mr. Muck stated that they were waiting for the Referee's report, that there wasn't much money left in the Estate, that that there was an IRS audit last year, and that there may be another audit. Mr. Muck also stated that once they receive the Referee's report they will accept/reject the creditor's claim and then they will file their petition. Mr. Muck confirmed for the Court that his current address is listed on the status report filed today. Mr. Parkin stated that his current address is: 151 Lake Road, Portola Valley, CA 94028. The Court stated that the Order to Show Cause would go off calendar based on the contents of the status report and that status on the filing of the petition for final distribution or a status report is continued to July 26, 2010.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR#11218. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Continued To Mar-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to show why the Administrator's powers should not be suspended or why both Counsel and the Conservator should not be sanctioned for failure to file a Petition for Final Distribution or a Status Report. The return date is March 1, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Curtis Muck for and with Curtis Parkin (Administrator).

Mr. Muck stated that there had been confusion with his partner as to who would be handling the case, stated that he would file the Inventory and Appraisal as soon as possible, and that he would also be filing a change of address. Mr. Muck and Mr. Parkins confirmed their addresses as follows:
Curtis Muck Curtis Parkin
27520 Hawthorne Blvd., Suite 185 151 Lake Road
Rolling Hills Estate, CA 90274 Portola Valley, CA 94028
Phone number (310) 544-0620 Phone number (650) 851-3494

The matter was continued to November 24, 2008 for status on the filing of the Inventory and Appraisal.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE AT APPOINTMENT INVENTORY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The Court stated for the record that the Administrator was not present, that notice was sent to his address of record as well as his address on file with the State Bar, that the Examiner had left voice mail messages and sent faxes, and still no response or appearance. The Court ordered that the powers of the Administrator be suspended.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.
